APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DANIEL D. GEOULLA, Esq. of B & D Law Group, APLC (Tel: 310-424-5252) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Vincent Morreale;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As To Plaintiff Vincent Morreale.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Motion To Be Relieved AS Counsel As To Plaintiff Vincent Morreale is GRANTED.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
